---
title: "Unique_Coordinates_Occurences"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-19"
---



## Code

```{r code}

library(tidyverse)

# ebird txt insert
file_path <- "ebd_US-CA-073_barswa5_200201_202112_smp_relMar-2026.txt"

# read
ebird_data_barnswallow <- read_tsv(file_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

# count unique coordinate pairs
unique_coordinates <- ebird_data_barnswallow %>%
  filter(!is.na(LATITUDE), !is.na(LONGITUDE)) %>%
  group_by(LATITUDE, LONGITUDE) %>%
  summarise(
    occurrence_count = n(),
    locality = first(LOCALITY),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(occurrence_count), LATITUDE, LONGITUDE)

# show them
print(unique_coordinates)

# Save output
write_csv(unique_coordinates, "barn_swallow_unique_coordinate_pairs_with_counts.csv")
```
